Refer Friends, Earn Forever

Get a $5 instant bonus when your friend makes their first deposit, plus a 5% revenue share on their net losses for 30 days. Tier 2 commission included on sub-referrals.

$5Instant bonus on first deposit
5%Tier 1 — direct referral net loss share (30 days)
1%Tier 2 — sub-referral net loss share (30 days)
∞No cap on the number of friends referred

How It Works

1
🔗

Share Your Link

Send your unique referral link via social media, email, or anywhere else. Every friend who signs up using your link is tracked to your account.

2
💳

Friend Deposits & Plays

Once your friend makes their first deposit, you both get an instant bonus. Then for 30 days, you earn 5% of every dollar they lose.

3
🎉

Compound With Tier 2

If your referee invites their friends, you earn 1% on those losses too. Build a referral network and earn passively.

  • Both referrer and referee must be over 18, KYC-verified, and have valid accounts.
  • The referee must be a brand-new player who has never held an account at Matrix Spins.
  • The $5 instant bonus is credited after the referee's first qualifying deposit clears.
  • Revenue share commissions accrue at 5% (Tier 1) and 1% (Tier 2) on the referee's net losses (wagered minus won) for 30 days from signup.
  • Commissions only accrue on real-money bets (not bonus or free-spin bets).
  • Referees must wager at least $10 lifetime before any commissions become payable.
  • Minimum claim threshold is $1.00. Claimed commissions go to bonus balance with a 10x wagering requirement.
  • Self-referrals, same-IP referrals, circular referrals, and duplicate accounts forfeit all rewards.
  • Maximum 5 successful referrals per referrer per day.
  • Self-excluded users may not claim commissions; pending commissions remain accrued during exclusion.
  • See Terms of Service and Responsible Gambling for full details.
